name: Bangpoo Industrial Estate
notes: Primary industrial employment and logistics anchor for Bang Pu. Important for commuter, shift-work, and fleet-support EV demand.

name: Bang Pu Recreation Center
notes: Coastal recreation destination and landmark; should not dominate by itself without built-support context.

name: Muang Boran / Ancient City
notes: Major destination attraction west of Bang Pu; useful for destination charging and weekend visitation signal.

name: Kheha BTS station
notes: Eastern BTS terminal for Samut Prakan commuter flow; strong transport and park-and-ride signal.

name: Robinson Lifestyle Samut Prakan
notes: Regional retail anchor at the western side of the Bang Pu commuter corridor.

name: Bang Pu municipality center
notes: Municipal center and urban-service node for Tambon Bang Pu.

name: Phraeksa market and community core
notes: Dense residential and market activity on the Praksa-Bang Pu side of Mueang Samut Prakan.

name: Bangpoo General Hospital
notes: Hospital and service anchor supporting Bang Pu industrial and residential catchments.
